'''chazumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psammosere|psammosere]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psammosere|psammosere]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chazumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzimith|chæzimith]] || [[word:chæzimij|chæzimij]] || [[word:chæzimish|chæzimish]] || [[word:chæzimi|chæzimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazuzumuth|chazuzumuth]] || [[word:chazuzumuj|chazuzumuj]] || [[word:chazuzumush|chazuzumush]] || [[word:chazuzumu|chazuzumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazumuth|chazumuth]] || [[word:chazumuj|chazumuj]] || [[word:chazumush|chazumush]] || [[word:chazumu|chazumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazufmuth|chazufmuth]] || [[word:chazufmuj|chazufmuj]] || [[word:chazufmush|chazufmush]] || [[word:chazufmuf|chazufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazumuthu|chazumuthu]] || [[word:chazumuju|chazumuju]] || [[word:chazumushu|chazumushu]] || [[word:chazumuku|chazumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazumuth|chazumuth]] || [[word:chazumuj|chazumuj]] || [[word:chazumush|chazumush]] || [[word:chazumu|chazumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazumuthul|chazumuthul]] || [[word:chazumujul|chazumujul]] || [[word:chazumushul|chazumushul]] || [[word:chazumukul|chazumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazumuthuthu|chazumuthuthu]] || [[word:chazumujuju|chazumujuju]] || [[word:chazumushushu|chazumushushu]] || [[word:chazumuku|chazumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazumuthun|chazumuthun]] || [[word:chazumujun|chazumujun]] || [[word:chazumushun|chazumushun]] || [[word:chazumukun|chazumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazumuthuoro|chazumuthuoro]] || [[word:chazumujuoro|chazumujuoro]] || [[word:chazumushuoro|chazumushuoro]] || [[word:chazumukuoro|chazumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
